knowledge: HTTP Request nodes use curl-like syntax (method, url, headers, body)
Parallelism: multiple outputs from 1 node execute simultaneously
Loop nodes process arrays item-by-item sequentially
Code nodes execute JavaScript or Python (return items format)
Rate limiting essential: minimum 2-5s between requests to same domain
Credentials NEVER hardcoded - always use Credentials node
Ollama API: POST /api/generate with {model, prompt, stream: false}
GitHub operations via Git node: commit, push, pull
File I/O: Write Binary File with Path + Data fields
Conditional logic: If/Else nodes or Switch based on conditions
Webhooks trigger workflows from external sources (HTTP POST)
Cron triggers schedule workflows (hour, minute, dayOfWeek)
Parallelism 60% faster than sequential for 5+ operations
Consolidate Results node essential for combining parallel outputs
🔴 CRÍTICO: N8N_USER_FOLDER DEVE ser definido antes de iniciar N8n
🔴 CRÍTICO: Sem N8N_USER_FOLDER, processo usa DB errado e workflows 'somem'
API Key fica em user_api_keys table no sqlite. Header: X-N8N-API-KEY
Dashboard chat endpoint: POST /api/squad/:id/task (não /api/chat)
Dashboard health: GET /api/health retorna squad + bots + projects
LaunchAgent plist com EnvironmentVariables garante N8N_USER_FOLDER permanente

criticalSetup.verifyCommand: curl -s http://localhost:5678/api/v1/workflows -H 'X-N8N-API-KEY: KEY' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(len(d.get('data',[])), 'workflows')"

wrongN8nUserFolder.solution: SEMPRE definir N8N_USER_FOLDER antes de iniciar
